nodes.prompt: Create the core directories for the Skillbrary project: .antigravity/skills, src/, and base module files (registry.py, runtime.py, router.py, fauxton_integration.py).
Implement the Skill Registry in src/registry.py. Needs CRUD operations for .antigravity/skills/skills.index.json, and functions to read/write SkillManifest types.
Implement the Skill Runtime and Sandbox Manager in src/runtime.py. This should include dummy sandbox constraints and a method to execute a RefinedSkillPlan safely.
Implement Capability Router in src/router.py. Search local learned skills first via registry, then external skills.sh registry (dummy external search for now). Should rank and refine skills.
Implement Fauxton Integration in src/fauxton_integration.py. Wire up routing logic to halt and request approval from fauxton for Tier 3/4 skills via generating an approval payload.
Implement a simple entry point src/main.py that exposes the Capability Router to trigger a skill search and execution flow for a given user intent.
